event: The Death of Priam (Fall of Troy)
description: A dramatic scene of violent destruction set before a burning palace. At center, an elderly figure is dragged or struck down at the base of an altar or monument while armored warriors attack. Women in flowing white and colored robes recoil in horror and grief to the left. Flames engulf the buildings in the background, casting an orange-red glow across the entire scene. A white marble statue or monument stands at the center above the carnage. Fallen bodies lie across the foreground.
